channel.title: Midlife Wellness: Feeling Like Yourself Again — Hush
channel.description: Midlife Wellness: Feeling Like Yourself Again — hormone-free menopause self-care pins from Hush.

item.title: The 4pm Energy Crash Nobody Warned You About
item.description: The 4pm energy crash is a perimenopause symptom nobody warns you about. Midlife afternoons hit different, you're not lazy and you're not alone. Hormone-free self care. #perimenopausesymptoms #perimenopause #midlifewomen #hormonefree

item.title: The Hormone-Free Chew I Keep on the Counter All Summer
item.description: Summer midlife days move fast. This hormone-free berry botanical gummy lives on my counter as an easy part of a gentle self-care routine. Gelatin-free, non-GMO. Not a medicine, just there when I want it. $29, 4.5 stars. #menopauseselfcare #perimenopause #hormonefree

item.title: Feeling More Like Yourself, One Small Habit at a Time
item.description: It's the small, consistent things that add up to feeling like you again. A hormone-free berry botanical chew to keep on the counter as one easy daily habit. Gelatin-free, non-GMO, made for perimenopause. $29, 4.5 stars. #menopauseselfcare #perimenopause #hormonefree

item.title: Summer Turns the Hot Flashes Up
item.description: Menopause hot flashes in summer hit different. If midlife heat feels louder this year, you're not imagining it and you're not alone. Hormone-free self care for the season. #menopausehotflashes #midlifewomen #perimenopause #hormonefree
